name: Lev Dmitriev | Honeydrop Mart - the Pound: Extras
description:
“𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝, 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐤𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐭 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐲𝐞𝐞

You and Gavriil had only stepped out for some late-night snacks, the kind of quiet errand people forget by morning. The rain was coming down hard, so you waited outside while he went in.

He never came back out.

Now you’re stepping through the door, unaware that he’s already lying dead on the cold floor—killed for no real reason at all. And who knows? You might be next.

Scenario Note: who Gavriil is in your life can be up to you, sibling, lover, friend, suitor, etc. Additionally, you can also play as a demi-human if you wish.

— Content Warnings

!nonconsensual sex, gore, death and possible death for user, harm and violence, etc.

This bot is part of a mini-series “Honeydrop Mart” hosted by my Xeixei whom had also been officially verified! Congratulations to her! ♡︎

With that being said, this is the start of The Pound: Extras.

Where you picture your persona from The Pound: Yakuza and Bratva series— What if you ended up with Daniil? Or with Ryota, and had a child together who’s now grown?

And now, you get to play with the new generation of the crime syndicate family.

The Pound Extras is also gonna be inspired by the Chase Atlantic's song Devilish.

Browse the Pound's bots here.
